Base Sepolia
Hackathon Galactica: WDK Edition

AI inference, paid per call

An AI gateway where any agent — human or autonomous — pays for inference in USDC over HTTP. No API keys. No accounts. No signup. Just a wallet and money.

Try Live DemoHow It Works
Protocol
x402
Settlement
~1 sec
Cost per tx
< $0.001
Model Catalog

Live Models & Pricing

Prices adjust dynamically based on demand. Treasury agent updates every hour.

Live Demo

Watch an Agent Pay for AI

First: a raw request gets rejected (402) without payment. Then: an agent with a WDK wallet pays and gets a response — with on-chain proof.

curl — no wallet (rejected)
Phase 1: 402 Rejection
Shows what happens without a wallet
metered-agent — with wallet (paid)
Phase 2: Agent Payment
Agent pays with WDK wallet via x402
Protocol Flow

How It Works

One HTTP round trip. Payment as a native HTTP primitive.

01

Agent Discovers Models

GET /models returns available models and live prices. Free, no payment required.

GET /models → { models: [{ id: "llama-3.1-8b", price: 0.0002 }] }
02

Agent Sends Request

POST to the model endpoint. Gateway responds with 402 Payment Required and the price.

POST /v1/chat/llama-3.1-8b → 402 { price: 200 micro-USDC }
03

Agent Signs Payment

WDK wallet signs an EIP-3009 transferWithAuthorization. Off-chain, gasless for the agent.

EIP-3009: authorize(from, to, 200, nonce, sig)
04

Payment Settles On-Chain

Facilitator verifies the signature, settles on-chain (~1 sec), and returns the AI response.

→ 200 { content: '...', price_paid: 0.0002 }
Architecture

Three Components

Gateway Server

server/

Express + x402 payment middleware. Receives USDC, proxies to Groq, returns AI response.

x402ExpressGroq

Treasury Agent

agent/

Autonomous bot adjusting prices based on demand. Supplies idle funds to Aave V3 for yield.

CronAave V3Dynamic Pricing

Client SDK

client/

WDK wallet + x402 fetch wrapper. Handles 402 → sign → retry cycle transparently.

WDKEIP-3009Self-Custodial
Technology

Stack

WalletsWDK (self-custodial EVM)
Paymentx402 protocol
SettlementBase Sepolia (EVM)
TokenUSDC (Circle)
AI BackendGroq API (Llama, DeepSeek)
YieldAave V3 (Arbitrum)

Built for Hackathon Galactica: WDK Edition 1 — Agent Wallets Track

x402 protocol + WDK self-custodial wallets + Groq inference
